campaign: C1 — Topology-First Layered Layout + Mode Seam
final_state: 226 web tests green, typecheck/lint/build clean. Structure (topological layered DAG) is the default roadmap layout; Timeline (calendar) is an opt-in toggle. Hand-rolled rank+order+coords (no dagre). Cycle back-edges render as amber facing-side contradiction arcs.
open_issues_for_C2: C2 RECONCILE: structure mode currently shows ALL epics (active+past+unscheduled folded into DAG; railComposed gated on effectiveMode at canvas:205-214). C2 re-gates rails on LIFECYCLE (done=receded/past, future=backlog). The 'shows all epics' canvas test (epic-roadmap-canvas.test.tsx) documents this interim and should be revisited by C2.P4.

E2E suite host-flaky (Playwright times out on unrelated specs, CPU idle). C1 changes functionally verified via unit + isolated spec. USER should run pnpm test:e2e locally / do a visual /verify of the /roadmap view.
P6 handoff (informational): client DFS back-edge may differ from server cycle banner edge; both valid cycle members; no UI contradiction (both endpoints get inCycle ring).
Long-span edges (rank distance >1) excluded from hand-rolled crossing count. Acceptable v1.

decisions.default_mode: structure (timeline is opt-in toggle; compact embed pinned structure)
